economic_notes: Entities accounted on modified equity basis include TTQ Economic Development Corporation (100%), Takem Ti Qwelsa7 Eco-Resource Corporation (100%), Xa'xtsa Gas Station Ltd (100%), 1020376 BC Ltd (33.33%), Tsetspa7 Forestry Limited Partnership (16.67%), Tsetspa7 Loakam (Logging) Ltd.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to: (1) unaccounted funded tangible capital assets including roads, bridges, buildings, water and utility systems required to be capitalized in prior years; (2) financial information for government business enterprises (GBEs) and government business partnerships (GBPs) not available and not accounted for in consolidated statements. Six entities accounted on modified equity basis but financial data unavailable. Annual debt service calculated as sum of principal repayments on long-term debt ($24,959), CMHC mortgage ($118,044), capital lease ($13,439), and demand loan net ($55,766 repaid less $836,169 proceeds — only repayment counted: $55,766). Total principal repayments excluding demand loan proceeds: $212,208. Total government transfers estimated as ISC + ISC Recovery + Province of BC + CMHC + First Nations Health Authority + First Nations Education Steering Committee + Department of Natural Resources.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
